name: Logwick
description: The audit log for AI agents. Log every prompt, response, and error your AI agents produce in production. Query logs in plain English via MCP.

skills.name: Ingest AI agent log
skills.description: Log an AI agent action including agent name, action type, input, output, status, tokens, latency, and cost.

skills.name: Query audit logs
skills.description: Search and filter AI agent logs by status, agent, action, date range, or keyword.

skills.name: Get usage statistics
skills.description: Get aggregated stats including success rate, error rate, average latency, total tokens, and cost.

skills.name: Pay-per-log via x402
skills.description: Log an AI action by paying $0.001 USDC on Base mainnet. No account required.

agentAuth.description: Pay $0.001 USDC on Base mainnet per log — no account required
